string 2:
Oh, that's what they used to be called. They're Apollomon
and Dianamon these days.
Dianamon is just up ahead, but...

...getting there won't be so easy. The two of them are in
the middle of a long squabble.

They won't let each other's messengers get through. They've
shut themselves away.
If you insist on going, though, I won't stop you...

But, at the very least, I'd say you should talk to Apollomon
first. At least Apollomon still has ears to listen with...
I already know what you are going to say.
You want me to make up with Dianamon, yes?

Dianamon is the one who made things worse. Outsiders,
please leave at once.

I told you to leave, did I not?! Do you require a few burns
to send you packing?!
Wait! Could you be... Are you—?!
You have heard the rumors about Dianamon, too?

I see... I did not want to believe it, but I suppose I
must...

If it has come to this, then I shall take care of Dianamon
with my own hands. Thus is the duty of family...!
